scripts.pretest: NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db HMAC_SECRET=test-hmac-secret-with-more-than-32-characters ADMIN_TOKEN=test-admin-token-123456 TREASURY_WALLET=11111111111111111111111111111111 SOLANA_CLUSTER=devnet REQUIRE_CHAIN_CONFIRMATION=false MAX_TRANSACTION_AGE_SECONDS=900 ALLOW_OVERPAYMENT=true IGNORE_REMAINDER=true MAX_TICKETS_PER_PURCHASE=1000 prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db HMAC_SECRET=test-hmac-secret-with-more-than-32-characters ADMIN_TOKEN=test-admin-token-123456 TREASURY_WALLET=11111111111111111111111111111111 SOLANA_CLUSTER=devnet REQUIRE_CHAIN_CONFIRMATION=false MAX_TRANSACTION_AGE_SECONDS=900 ALLOW_OVERPAYMENT=true IGNORE_REMAINDER=true MAX_TICKETS_PER_PURCHASE=1000 node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/*.test.js
